resultList.dtldesc: This exquisite 2 BHK apartment in Bachupally offers a sophisticated living experience within the prestigious Urbanrise On Cloud 33 project. Designed with modern architecture and luxury in mind, this residence provides a perfect sanctuary for those seeking a high-quality lifestyle in one of Hyderabads most sought-after residential hubs. The property is meticulously crafted to ensure a refreshing environment with ample natural light and excellent ventilation, catering to the needs of a contemporary family.Property SpecificationsThe apartment boasts a generous super area of 1,110 sq. ft and is positioned on the 26th floor of an impressive 33-storey building, offering breathtaking views of the city skyline and lush green landscapes. This east-facing unit is thoughtfully designed to be Vaastu compliant, fostering a positive and harmonious living space. The semi-furnished layout includes two spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms equipped with premium fittings. A private balcony attached to the living area provides a serene spot to unwind. The interiors are elegantly finished with high-quality vitrified flooring, and the kitchen is designed for efficiency with a granite platform and stainless steel sink.FacilitiesResidents of this premier gated community enjoy access to over 30 world-class amenities designed for leisure and wellness. The project features a grand clubhouse, a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool with water slides for children, and a mini cinema theatre. For sports enthusiasts, there are outdoor tennis courts, a half-basketball court, and a jogging track. The property ensures a hassle-free lifestyle with 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, and high-speed lifts. Security is paramount, with round-the-clock personnel, CCTV surveillance, and intercom facilities. Additional conveniences include piped gas, a cafeteria, and dedicated visitor parking.LocalityLocated on the Bachupally Main Road, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to the IT corridors and major commercial centres of Hyderabad. The neighbourhood is an educational hub, with reputed institutions such as Delhi Public School and Mamata Academy of Medical Sciences located in the immediate vicinity. Healthcare needs are well-addressed by Reach Superspeciality Hospital and R3 Hospitals, situated just a short drive away. For shopping and daily essentials, Bachupally Centre and several supermarkets are easily accessible. The locality is well-serviced by public transport, with the Bachupally bus stop nearby, ensuring smooth commutes for all residents.

The apartment is unfurnished, allowing you to customise the interiors to your taste. It comprises four well-proportioned bedrooms and three bathrooms with a combined layout. Two balconies enhance the living experience by offering outdoor spaces with views of the garden, park, and clubhouse. The kitchen is designed in a standard layout and is supported by a piped gas connection. The flooring is finished with durable tiles, and the apartment is east-facing, ensuring ample natural light and a bright ambience throughout the day.FacilitiesThe project is equipped with a wide array of modern amenities curated for a premium lifestyle. Residents benefit from covered parking for one car, along with provisions for EV vehicle charging. The development features multiple lifts, ensuring smooth vertical movement across the high-rise towers. Essential services such as round-the-clock water supply, power backup, and security are in place. The project stands out with its rooftop amenities and uniquely designed sit-out and garden spaces on the 17th and 27th floors, where no residential units are placed, offering dedicated leisure zones for residents.LocalityStrategically located beside Mamata Medical College, the property enjoys excellent connectivity and proximity to key landmarks. Kennedy High International School is situated just adjacent to the project, while Silver Oaks International School is within walking distance, making it ideal for families. The Miyapur metro station is located nearby, ensuring smooth connectivity to other parts of Hyderabad. The locality is well-developed with easy access to healthcare facilities, educational institutions, and daily conveniences, making it a desirable residential destination.

resultList.dtldesc: Step into a world of contemporary elegance with this stunning residential apartment located in the prestigious Financial District. This property represents a premier opportunity for those seeking a sophisticated urban lifestyle in one of Hyderabads most dynamic and high-growth corridors. Designed to meet the needs of modern professionals and families alike, the residence combines architectural excellence with functional design, ensuring a living space that is as practical as it is beautiful.Property SpecificationsThis expansive apartment boasts a generous super area of 1,980 sq. ft and is situated on a higher floor of a majestic high-rise building, offering panoramic views of the city skyline. The locality is home to some of Hyderabads finest international schools, world-class hospitals, and luxury shopping destinations. resultList.dtldesc: 4 BHK Villa in Manjeera Purple Town Villas for Sale in Tellapur, HyderabadSet within a premium gated community in Tellapur, this newly constructed 4 BHK independent villa presents an excellent opportunity for families seeking a spacious, private and well-planned home in one of Hyderabads fastest developing residential corridors. Designed for comfortable modern living, the villa enjoys an east-facing orientation, serene garden views and the advantage of a secure, well-established neighbourhood with high owner occupancy.Property SpecificationsThe villa is built on a plot area of approximately 300 sq. yards with a well-laid G 2 construction spanning around 3400 sq. ft of carpet area. The layout comprises four generously sized bedrooms, five bathrooms and three balconies, ensuring ample light and ventilation throughout. Additional spaces include a puja room, study, store room and a dedicated servant or house help accommodation, catering to the needs of larger families. The villa is semi-furnished and thoughtfully planned to support both everyday living and entertaining, including provision for a home theatre. Being newly constructed, the property reflects contemporary design standards and quality finishes.FacilitiesResidents benefit from 24-hour water supply and a reliable electricity setup with rare power interruptions. The gated community offers a three-tier security system, ensuring a safe and peaceful living environment. Visitor parking is available, along with internal roads and landscaped open areas that enhance the overall ambience. The villa overlooks green garden spaces, contributing to a calm and pollution-free setting ideal for family living, leisure and wellness-oriented lifestyles.LocalityTellapur is strategically located close to Nanakramguda, Gachibowli, the Financial District and HITEC City, making it highly suitable for professionals working in Hyderabads IT and corporate hubs. The area enjoys excellent connectivity to the Outer Ring Road, ensuring smooth access to major parts of the city. Reputed schools, hospitals, daily convenience stores and upcoming commercial developments are within easy reach, adding long-term value and convenience. With a strong residential character and growing infrastructure, this villa is well suited for end users as well as buyers looking for a stable, high-potential investment in a premium gated community.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience the pinnacle of luxury living with this exquisite independent villa located in the prestigious Villa Scapes project in Gandipet, Hyderabad. This grand residence is designed for those who seek an elite lifestyle, offering a harmonious blend of sophisticated architecture and expansive living spaces. Nestled in a serene and low-density environment, the property provides a peaceful retreat while being strategically positioned near Hyderabad's primary financial and commercial hubs, making it an ideal choice for discerning homeowners.::::Property Specifications::::This magnificent villa boasts a substantial carpet area of 3,700 sq. ft, thoughtfully distributed to provide an optimal balance of private and communal spaces. The residence features five spacious bedrooms and five well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring maximum comfort for a large household. As a resale property with an age of 10 to 15 years, it has been meticulously maintained and is offered in a semi-furnished state, allowing for a convenient move-in while offering scope for personal customisation. The home includes two private balconies that offer pleasant views of the surrounding greenery, and the structure is permitted for construction up to three floors. The villa is designed to be Vaastu compliant, ensuring a positive and harmonious living environment.::::Facilities::::The Villa Scapes community provides an extensive array of world-class facilities designed to enhance the quality of life for its residents. Essential amenities include 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, and round-the-clock security with intercom facilities. For recreation and wellness, the project features a premium clubhouse, a swimming pool, a gymnasium, and dedicated meditation areas. Outdoor enthusiasts will appreciate the cycling and jogging tracks, multipurpose courts, and indoor squash and badminton courts. Practical needs are well-catered for with reserved and visitor parking, piped gas connections, and professional maintenance staff. The presence of beautifully landscaped flower gardens and private terrace areas adds a touch of natural elegance to the daily living experience.::::Locality::::Situated in the upscale neighbourhood of Gandipet, the property enjoys a strategic location with excellent connectivity to the Outer Ring Road and the Financial District. The area is renowned for its lush environment and proximity to reputable educational institutions such as the Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology and Palavi International School. Healthcare needs are easily met with Freedom Hospitals located just 0.8 km away. The locality is a thriving commercial and residential hub, offering a wide range of high-end dining, shopping, and entertainment options. With its well-developed infrastructure and tranquil atmosphere, Gandipet remains one of the most desirable residential destinations in West Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the well-connected residential locality of Dammaiguda, this 2 BHK independent house offers a practical living environment suitable for families as well as potential commercial usage. The property is situated near Vikas Nagar 5th Line and enjoys convenient access to nearby schools, healthcare facilities, and everyday services, making it a suitable option for comfortable living.::::Property Specifications::::The house offers a carpet area of 979 sq. ft and is designed across a G plus 1 floor structure. The property is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences and requirements.::::The layout includes two bedrooms and two bathrooms, along with one balcony that overlooks the main road. The living and dining areas are combined, creating a practical layout suitable for everyday family living.::::The kitchen is designed as a standard kitchen setup, offering sufficient space for daily cooking requirements.
